creator: freebsd@gregv.net
text:
Created attachment 217749
samhain-4.4.2

Update to 4.4.2 per latest upstream.

Note in the 4.4.1 update (bug 244648) I introduced a patch to fix a build failure when not using GnuPG.  This fix was also accepted upstream so in this bug I'm removing it from the ports tree as no longer necessary.
